node.text: Jolene recently presented at a virtual conference and received positive feedback, confirming she is on the right track.

node.text: Jolene is an engineering student with a passion for using her talents to help solve important problems and make the world a better place.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked on robotics project duration") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.81)

node.text: Jolene is studying engineering in school while balancing her partner's video games.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked on robotics project duration") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: Jolene finds teaming up with her partner on engineering projects enjoyable.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked on robotics project duration") on Observation 6 (Score: 0.72)

node.text: Jolene and her partner met in an engineering class in college and their romantic relationship grew from a friendship.
Jolene is finding it challenging to juggle her engineering studies, relationship, and personal growth.
Jolene has started using a bullet journal as a time management strategy to track tasks and stay organized.
Jolene accomplished something significant with her engineering project and came up with neat solutions that she's excited about.
Jolene plans to team up with local schools/centers to do workshops and invite engineers as guest speakers for the volunteer program.
Jolene had an idea for a volunteer program where engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids.
